criteria.name: cleaning.py runs end-to-end without error
criteria.evidence: Pipeline produces outputs for all 6 stations. Exit gate tests pass (9/9).

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_hourly.csv
criteria.evidence: Committed at HEAD: cavendish, greenwich, north_rustico, stanhope, stanley_bridge, tracadie all have station_hourly.csv

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_daily.csv
criteria.evidence: All 6 stations have station_daily.csv committed at HEAD.

criteria.name: Hourly CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: Verified cavendish station_hourly.csv header contains ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi.

criteria.name: Daily CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: Verified all 6 station_daily.csv headers contain ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi.

criteria.name: Imputation report exists
criteria.evidence: data/processed/imputation_report.csv exists at HEAD with station,variable,time_start,time_end,method,count_affected columns.

criteria.name: Imputation runs after concat+dedup
criteria.evidence: Pipeline flow in cleaning.py: discover -> adapt -> concat -> dedup -> resample -> impute -> FWI. Tests verify ordering.

criteria.name: Long gaps remain NaN
criteria.evidence: impute_frame uses limit=6 for hourly interpolation. Test suite validates gap behavior.

criteria.name: FWI calculated on imputed data
criteria.evidence: Pipeline calls impute_frame before calculate_fwi. All committed outputs show FWI columns populated.

summary: Phase 3 review PASS. Previous REJECT was due to stale pre-flight config referencing pseudocode function names. Ralph fixed pre-flight checks (2756cb8) to match actual implementation names (build_raw_manifest, resample_hourly, resample_daily, impute_frame, materialize_resampled_outputs). All 9 acceptance criteria now satisfied. Artifact validation PASS (15/15 checks). Pre-flight PASS (5/5 functions found). Architecture: all 4 adapters inherit BaseAdapter, router uses ADAPTER_REGISTRY dict. Lint-only commits (d3eea22, bc5b301) cleaned up ruff E501/F841 errors. Exit gate tests: 9/9 passed.
